form.formComment: Returns from a 36-day let-up. Last start made ground from midfield; 2nd of 7 at this track on March 9 over 1400m, 2 len behind Kagayaki Temma carrying 57kg at $2. The start before that 13th of 16 at this track on February 16 over 1400m, 12 len behind Una Montana Alta with 55kg at $7.80. Draws well and is a strong winning chance.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Freshened for 53 days. First-up ran last of 12 at this track on January 28 over 1400m, 13 len behind Civic Dream with 55kg at $4. Second run from a spell came from midfield; 2nd of 15 at this track on February 20 over 1400m, neck behind Bentayga with 56kg at $4.80. Chance with the aid of an inside gate.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Returns from a 33-day let-up. At the latest run favourite; tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 2.5 len at this track March 12 over 1600m defeating Crown Shooter carrying 55kg at $2.20. The start before that raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 13 at this track on February 16 over 1600m, 4.5 len behind Mikuni Sunbeam with 56kg at $14.40. Has the ability to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of ten months. Previously first up; 14th of 16 at Tokyo Dirt April 26 over 1400m, 11 len behind Bidaaya carrying 58.0kg at $160.50. Has the ability to run well.

form.formComment: Comes off a 33 day let-up. At the latest run eased back early on 7th of 9 at this track on March 12 over 1600m, 6 len behind Presto Arthur carrying 54kg at $106.60. The race before that eased back early on 7th of 12 at this track on January 28 over 1400m, 5.5 len behind Civic Dream with 57kg at $49.70. Draw no help to chances.

form.formComment: Most recently tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 6th of 8 at this track on March 25 over 1200m, 11 len behind Spirit Guide carrying 57kg at $10. The run before that failed to make an impression; ran last of 9 at this track on March 12 over 1600m, 17 len behind Presto Arthur with 57kg at $7.80. Wide draw makes it tough.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Not raced for 40 days. Resuming crossed from a wide gate to settle just off the pace but gave ground when 5th of 14 at Funabashi on February 11 over 1600m, 5 len behind Carnival March carrying 56kg at $18.30. Second run from a spell raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by 1.0 len at Kawasaki March 5 over 1500m defeating Soy Latte carrying 56kg at $4.70. Expected to perform well.
